title: 10 best herbal tinctures for ovulation pain
description: Valerian tinctures helps with ovulation pain because it has a natural analgesic effect, soothing cramps and discomfort associated with ovulation. The herb's active compounds, including valerenic acid and isovaleric acid, have been shown to relax the uterine muscles, reducing spasms and inflammation that can cause sharp pains during ovulation. Additionally, valerian has a calming influence on the nervous system, helping to reduce anxiety and stress that may exacerbate ovulation discomfo...
